design_strategy.visual_style: High contrast, generous negative space, editorial typography, immersive imagery

headings.usage: Hero titles, section headers, product names

grids.shop_catalog: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-16

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-[#C5A059] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white hover:bg-white hover:text-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs transition-all duration-300
buttons.shop_primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-[#C5A059] rounded-none px-6 py-3 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.feature: relative overflow-hidden border border-white/10 bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm p-8

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-white rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors

hero.alt: Man in suit looking over shoulder

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-end luxury fashion e-commerce site. The user experience must feel 'expensive' - this means slow, smooth animations, high contrast, and no clutter.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: Use the 'Tetris' grid (Mode A) for the hero section. Mix video/image content with minimal text. The background should be #0A0A0A (Obsidian). Use 'Bodoni Moda' for all headings.
instructions_to_main_agent.shop_page: Switch to a cleaner, lighter theme (or keep it dark if you can maintain readability). Use a strict 4-column grid. Product cards should be minimal: Image + Name + Price. No 'Add to Cart' buttons cluttering the grid - reveal them on hover.
instructions_to_main_agent.product_detail: Split screen layout. Left side: Scrollable image gallery (sticky). Right side: Product details (sticky). Use 'Manrope' for the description text.
instructions_to_main_agent.interactions: Use 'sonner' for toast notifications (e.g., 'Added to Cart'). Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling on the body.
instructions_to_main_agent.mock_data: Create a robust mock data file for products. Use the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Do not use gradients for backgrounds - use solid colors or subtle noise textures.
